objective:
FICHE_STRATEGIE v1
id: mean_reversion_bollinger_rsi
archetype: mean_reversion_bollinger_rsi
family: mean_reversion
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
- bollinger(period=16, std_dev=2.1)
- rsi(period=17)
- atr(period=14)
entry:
- long: close < bollinger.lower and rsi < 35
- short: close > bollinger.upper and rsi > 65
exit:
- condition: cross_any(close, bollinger.middle) or cross_any(rsi, 50)
risk:
stop_atr_mult: 2.5
tp_atr_mult: 2.5
description: ATR stop-loss (2.5x) and take-profit (2.5x)
constraints:
- no_lookahead: true
- only_registry_indicators: true

iterations.hypothesis: The combination of RSI, Bollinger Bands and ATR helps to identify mean reversion in a 1-hour timeframe.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] The strategy seems to be based on mean reversion principles using three different indicators. The backtest is running and results are not yet available.
[Backup plan] If the current strategy performs poorly, I would consider trying other strategies that use similar ideas but with potentially better performance. This could include adjusting parameters within this strategy or exploring alternative approaches entirely. In addition to technical adjustments, it may also be necessary to revisit the underlying assumptions of the strategy and its applicability in different market conditions.

iterations.hypothesis: La stratégie utilise des indicateurs de réduction des faux signal (Mean Reversion, Bollinger Band et ATR) combinés à une stratégie d'oscillation (Donchian Channel) afin d'améliorer les retours sur investissement.
A combination of Bollinger Bands and RSI with ATR based risk management reduces the impact of false signals in ranging markets, while still capturing trending market conditions.
